calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
Dan Monberg, Vice President of Bank of the West, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearnce by defendants Cape Fear Land Services, Inc., or Jeffrey C. Applewhite.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 11, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Equipment Finance Agreement, dated December 31, 2007----------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit--2--Personal Guaranty, dated December 31, 2007--------------------------------ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of the West, and against defendants Cape Fear Land Services, Inc., and Jeffrey C. Applewhite as follows:

Principal - $138,924.38.
Interest - $14,538.92.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $450.00.

Total - $156,413.30.

Additionally, it is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff, Bank of the West, is the owner of the leased equipment described on page 2 of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions And For Order Striking Answer And Entering Default Against Deft For Failure To Comply With Discovery Order;
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Plaintiff Bank of the West's Motion for terminating sanctions and for order striking answer and entering default against defendant for failure to comply with discovery order, denied without prejudice to motion for issue and/or evidentiary sanctions. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported. (610/PS)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel Dean D. Paik for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/good cause. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant Jeffrey C. Applewhite for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant Jeffrey Applewhite is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Continued To Jan-05-10 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 608

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Admissions, To Strike Objections, Or In The Alternative, For An Order Striking The Defts' Answer; For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Douglas A. Holloway, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Bank of the West

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Bank of the West's Motion to compel further answers to interrogatories and request for admissions, to strike objections, or in the alternative, for an order striking the defendants' answer; and for sanctions granted in part, denied in part:
1. Motion to compel further answers to interrogatories and request for admissions granted:
a. All objections are stricken except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Each defendant shall serve full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's interrogatories and request for admission and/or genuineness of documents within fifteen days of notice of entry of this order;
c. To the extent defendants assert privilege as a basis to refuse to respond, they shall serve a code compliant privilege log along with the responses ordered herein;
2. Motion to strike defendants' answer denied;
3. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue on the sum of $390.00, to run jointly and severally against defendants, and payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Dean D. Paik, Esq. and Michelle L. Baker, Esq. of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell, Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for DEFENDANTS JEFFREY C. APPLEWHITE, AND, CAPE FEAR LAND SERVICES, INC. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Request for attorney fees denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-11-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-14-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 608

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Continued To Jul-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CAPE FEAR LAND SERVICES, INC., and, JEFFREY APPLEWHITE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to Quash is denied. Forum selection clause is enforceable. Insufficient showing that enforcement of clause unreasonable. (302CWW/DC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
